mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.user_id, s.folder_id, s.color_id, s.source_url, s.type, s.memo, s.created_at, s.updated_at, s.like_count, s.visibility, CASE WHEN s.type = 'code' THEN sc.content WHEN s.type = 'text' THEN st.content ELSE NULL END as content, CASE WHEN s.type = 'code' THEN sc.language ELSE NULL END as language, s.memo as title FROM snippets s INNER JOIN snippet_tags snt ON s.id = snt.snippet_id LEFT JOIN snippet_codes sc ON s.id = sc.snippet_id AND s.type = 'code' LEFT JOIN snippet_texts st ON s.id = st.snippet_id AND s.type = 'text' WHERE snt.tag_id = #{tagId} ORDER BY s.created_at DESC

SELECT s.id, s.user_id, s.folder_id, s.color_id, s.source_url, s.type, s.memo, s.created_at, s.updated_at, s.like_count, s.visibility, CASE WHEN s.type = 'code' THEN sc.content WHEN s.type = 'text' THEN st.content ELSE NULL END as content, CASE WHEN s.type = 'code' THEN sc.language ELSE NULL END as language, s.memo as title FROM snippets s LEFT JOIN snippet_codes sc ON s.id = sc.snippet_id AND s.type = 'code' LEFT JOIN snippet_texts st ON s.id = st.snippet_id AND s.type = 'text' WHERE s.id = #{id}

SELECT s.id, s.user_id, s.folder_id, s.color_id, s.source_url, s.type, s.memo, s.created_at, s.updated_at, s.like_count, s.visibility, CASE WHEN s.type = 'code' THEN sc.content WHEN s.type = 'text' THEN st.content ELSE NULL END as content, CASE WHEN s.type = 'code' THEN sc.language ELSE NULL END as language, s.memo as title FROM snippets s LEFT JOIN snippet_codes sc ON s.id = sc.snippet_id AND s.type = 'code' LEFT JOIN snippet_texts st ON s.id = st.snippet_id AND s.type = 'text' ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE snippets SET user_id = #{userId}, folder_id = #{folderId}, color_id = #{colorId}, source_url = #{sourceUrl}, type = #{type}, memo = #{memo}, updated_at = NOW(), visibility = #{visibility} WHERE id = #{id}
